creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  - Update to 3.0.2 [1]
  - Fix whitespace in pkg-deinstall [2]
  - Use %%PREFIX%% in pkg-message [2]
  - Document that make_sqlite_tables needs to be run as bacula user [2]

                  [2]: ports/133818
